overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with a large backpack traversing a dark, stormy alien landscape with floating rock formations. The character walks through open grasslands and narrow canyons while rain falls, navigating toward a distant structure visible in the misty valley.

events.description: approaching the entrance to a narrow canyon between large rock formations

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily across the grassy plateau toward distant rock formations with a large backpack

entered.detail: large floating geological formations suspended in the air against the stormy sky
tall thin rock pinnacle rising from the ground
dark grassy terrain stretching across the plateau floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open grassy plateau surrounded by floating rock formations and distant mountains. The stormy blue-hour lighting creates a moody atmosphere as the character approaches a narrow canyon entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage between towering rock walls

events.description: entering the narrow enclosed canyon with high rock walls on both sides
passing under a large overhanging rock formation that temporarily blocks the view of the sky

agents.ego_description: character navigating carefully through the narrow rocky passage with large backpack

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
large rock formation extending overhead from the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, enclosed canyon passage with towering rock walls on both sides. The space is tight and dark, with occasional overhanging rocks creating temporary cover from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty valley with distant ruins structure

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon into the open misty valley with destination visible
distant ruins structure becomes more clearly visible through the valley mist

agents.ego_description: character approaching a distant structure across the open valley with navigation markers visible

entered.detail: ancient ruins or structure visible in the distance through the mist
low-lying fog and mist covering the valley floor
rocky cliff edges forming the boundaries of the wide valley

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon, the character emerges into a wide misty valley with ancient ruins visible in the far distance. The open space is filled with atmospheric fog and vertical rain streaks as the character continues toward the destination structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, stormy plateau through a restrictive canyon and into a vast, misty valley. It begins with the character traversing a grassy highland surrounded by floating rock formations and distant mountains under moody blue-hour lighting. As the character reaches the edge of the plateau, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed canyon passage where towering rock walls create a tight, dark corridor. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the confinement of the cliffs, opening up into a wide valley filled with atmospheric fog and vertical rain streaks. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal ancient ruins standing in the far distance as the character continues their journey toward the destination structure.
